footprints.advice:
### EcoLens AI Simulated Analysis 🌍

Based on your monthly carbon footprint of **430.12 kg CO₂**, your biggest contributor is **FOOD** (150 kg CO₂).

#### 🔍 Source Breakdown:
- 🚗 Transportation: **130.12 kg CO₂**
- ⚡ Electricity: **100 kg CO₂**
- 🥗 Diet & Food: **150 kg CO₂**
- 🛍️ Shopping & Consumables: **50 kg CO₂**

#### 💡 Personalized Recommendations:
- **Diet Shift:** Transitioning some of your non-vegetarian/mixed meals to plant-based choices can cut dietary emissions by **30-50 kg CO₂** monthly. Try observing "Meatless Mondays".
- **Reduce Waste:** Buy only what you need. Food waste in landfills accounts for significant global methane emissions.

#### 🎯 Quick Wins:
- **Switch to LED bulbs:** Saves about **5 kg CO₂** per month per room.
- **Wash laundry in cold water:** Saves **10-15 kg CO₂** monthly by avoiding water heating.
- **One meat-free day per week:** Saves approximately **12 kg CO₂** per month.

### EcoLens AI Simulated Analysis 🌍

Based on your monthly carbon footprint of **1017.17 kg CO₂**, your biggest contributor is **ELECTRICITY** (500 kg CO₂).

#### 🔍 Source Breakdown:
- 🚗 Transportation: **317.17 kg CO₂**
- ⚡ Electricity: **500 kg CO₂**
- 🥗 Diet & Food: **150 kg CO₂**
- 🛍️ Shopping & Consumables: **50 kg CO₂**

#### 💡 Personalized Recommendations:
- **Smart Appliances:** Your monthly consumption is 1000 kWh. Switching to LED bulbs and setting your thermostat 1-2 degrees lower can save up to **50 kg CO₂** per month.
- **Standby Draw:** Unplug devices when not in use. Standby power accounts for 5-10% of home electricity use.

#### 🎯 Quick Wins:
- **Switch to LED bulbs:** Saves about **5 kg CO₂** per month per room.
- **Wash laundry in cold water:** Saves **10-15 kg CO₂** monthly by avoiding water heating.
- **One meat-free day per week:** Saves approximately **12 kg CO₂** per month.

challenges.title: Cold Water Wash
challenges.description: Wash all your laundry loads using cold water settings to reduce hot-water energy consumption.

challenges.title: Veggie Day
challenges.description: Eat entirely vegetarian or vegan meals today to lower agricultural impact.

challenges.title: Active Commute
challenges.description: Replace at least one short car trip (< 3 km) by walking, biking, or riding transit.
